description_long: This is a compact, muscular dog with a short, smooth coat that is predominantly fawn with white markings on the chest, face, and legs. The dog has a broad, square-shaped head with a short muzzle and expressive, round eyes. Its ears are large, upright, and set wide apart, giving it an alert and attentive appearance. The body is sturdy and low to the ground, with a wide chest and a slightly arched back. The legs are short and strong, and the dog is shown lying flat with its hind legs splayed out behind it, a posture often called 'frog-legging.' The tail is short and straight, lying flat against the ground.
description: A small, muscular fawn and white dog with upright ears and a short tail, lying flat with its legs splayed out behind it.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dog's broad face, upright ears, and white markings on the chest and face.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the dog's elongated body, splayed hind legs, and fawn coat with white paws.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dog's short, straight tail and muscular hindquarters with legs extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the dog's profile, upright ear, and the full stretch of its body and legs.
